episodes.name: Humari Shaadi Nahi Hui
episodes.overview: Aditya and Amrita's love blooms amidst disapproving looks. 25 years later, Amrita is at the peak of her career and Aditya is her biggest support.

episodes.name: Jo Raah Tune Chuni
episodes.overview: Amrita worries about how Vasudha would react, but the mother surprises her daughter. Problems brew around Neeraj's dream project and with Vasudha's health.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1ssvpkdgdz4o/sangamarmar-s01e02-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Maiyya ki Odhaniya
episodes.overview: Vasudha's death shatters the family. Being the eldest, everyone expects Amrita to step up, but she feels lost.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/g1xo8un3t2ma/sangamarmar-s01e03-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Yeh Din Bhi Dhal Jaayenge
episodes.overview: Amrita loses herself in added responsibilities, but Aditya tries to cheer her up. Meanwhile, Neeraj's problems at work spill over onto his home life, alarming Amrita.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fy1zxlt1d64g/sangamarmar-s01e04-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: We Need You, Papa
episodes.overview: Amrita confronts her father again, but he still struggles by himself. Finally, Aditya and Amrita convince Neeraj to go for therapy.

episodes.name: Beti Hokar...
episodes.overview: Amrita's memories of her father are tainted by his death. Neeraj's last words to the world make her feel hurt and betrayed.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/hpumsxehimmv/sangamarmar-s01e06-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Reham
episodes.overview: Amrita tries to hide the tragic news of their father's death from her siblings. But what happens when Abhinav and Preeti go missing from school?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/jmab1ucukx3m/sangamarmar-s01e07-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Maan-Swabhimaan
episodes.overview: Amrita's uncle Naveen is arrested for a cheque bounce case. When she tries to free him, she discovers the overwhelming debt of the company. Finally, Aditya provides a solution.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/hgmhlrh0if5m/sangamarmar-s01e08-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Seekh Jaaungi!
episodes.overview: Amrita decides to fight her battle alone. In a meeting with the lenders, she declares that she would take over her dad's business and gets seven days to submit the project report.
